import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut current = ""
  mut has = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        result = list.push(result, parsed)
        current = ""
        has = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, parsed)
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted_unique(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(sorted, x)
    sorted
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < sorted.len()
      let v = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(w)
        w
      when None
        0
      end
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in nums1
    sorted = insert_sorted_unique(sorted, x)
  end
  for x in nums2
    sorted = insert_sorted_unique(sorted, x)
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
